_comment: Reference UCP manifest for a merchant accepting PayClaw-badged agents. Place at /.well-known/ucp on your domain.

merchant.name: Acme Store
merchant._comment: Your store name and domain. Agents use this to identify the merchant.

capabilities.name: io.payclaw.common.identity
capabilities._comment: Declares that this merchant recognizes PayClaw agent badges. Agents with valid badges present them at checkout.

config._comment: false (default): badged agents are preferred but unbadged agents can still check out. true: agents without a valid badge receive requires_escalation.
